---
about:
  id: Resume-Main
  template: broadside
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 600px

format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1200px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    max-width: 1600px
---

# Jonathan Barnes

::: {#Resume-Main}
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
|                       | **Expertise**          |                      |
+:=====================:+:======================:+:====================:+
| Data Visualization    | R                      | Data Pipelines       |
|                       |                        |                      |
| Data Cleaning         | Programming            | Data Communication   |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
|                       | **Proficiencies**      |                      |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
| Applied Statistics    | Data Analysis          | Data Engineering     |
|                       |                        |                      |
| Machine Learning      | Research Methodologies | Predictive Modeling  |
|                       |                        |                      |
| Project Management    | Databases              | Data Privacy         |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
|                       | **Languages & Tools**  |                      |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
| R                     | Python                 | SQL                  |
|                       |                        |                      |
| Shiny                 | Quarto                 | Linux                |
|                       |                        |                      |
| Git                   | PowerShell             | API's                |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
|                       | **Strengths**          |                      |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
| Creativity            | Problem solving        | Critical Thinking    |
|                       |                        |                      |
| Pattern Recognition   | Conscientiousness      | Technical Writing    |
+-----------------------+------------------------+----------------------+
:::

### University of Minnesota, Minneapolis, MN \
**Graduate Teaching Assistant \| Biostatistics 1 (Aug. 2024 -- Dec. 2024)**\
Taught weekly lab sessions in R and SAS, helping students develop proficiency in statistical programming and data analysis. Provided individualized support during office hours, clarified course concepts. Evaluated and graded assignments and quizzes, offering constructive feedback to enhance student understanding and academic performance. Collaborated with the instructor to ensure alignment with course objectives and addressed student concerns effectively.

**Graduate Research Assistant (Oct. 2023 -- May 2024)**\
Managed a project investigating biomarkers in the Health and Retirement Study (HRS), with a focus on Dementia and Alzheimer's disease. Conducted comprehensive analyses of plasma biomarkers, developed group classifications based on biomarker elevations, and performed differential gene expression analysis tied to cognitive decline. Built statistical models to examine relationships between cognitive scores and outputs from OLINK and Quanterix platforms. Explored the validation of a previously published aging clock model from ARIC study data using HRS datasets. \

### University of St. Thomas, St. Paul and Minneapolis, MN \
**ITS Support Services Intern & Service Desk Technician (June 2022 -- Aug. 2023)**\
Received the ITS Outstanding Student Award for excellence in service and innovation. Developed and maintained a Python application critical to organizational operations and managed digital signage updates across multiple sites. Mentored junior staff, fostering technical skills and professional growth, while resolving over 4,500 service tickets and managing departmental ticketing systems. Authored comprehensive technical documentation and procedural guides for ITS staff, students, and faculty. Led efficiency enhancement initiatives to streamline processes and workflows. Served as an essential operational cornerstone, proactively addressing potential vulnerabilities and ensuring seamless operations.

**ITS Rollout Intern (May 2022 -- Sept. 2022)**\
Oversaw the imaging, setup, and software installation of over 1,500 computers for campus-wide use. Assisted with inventory management and ensured smooth transitions following replacements and setups.

**ITS Service Desk Senior Student Technician (Aug. 2021 -- June 2022)**\
Served as the primary point of contact for student workers at phone centers and walk-up desks. Created procedural documentation utilized by ITS staff and student workers to standardize operations and enhance service quality.

<a href="Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary"> <i class="bi bi-save"></i> Download Resume </a>
